title: psychotria porcata
intro: Psychotria porcata, also known as the Wild Coffee or Monkey Coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a medicinal plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America, where its leaves are traditionally used to make a tea with stimulant properties similar to caffeine, but without the negative side effects. The medicinal properties of Psychotria porcata include its ability to increase alertness, improve mental clarity, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The leaves can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headaches, and digestive issues.
